
```{r,datadesciption, echo=FALSE,include=FALSE}
# Original data year range
  runyr <- paste(min(params$tbl_data[,1]),'-',max(params$tbl_data[,1]))
# Original number of years
  n.yrs <- length(params$tbl_data[,1])
# Trimmed n.years   
  rn.yrs <- input$sryears[2]-input$sryears[1]+1
  dif <- (n.yrs != rn.yrs)
# Trimmed year range
  rbyr <- ifelse(dif,paste(input$sryears[1],'-',input$sryears[2]),'No data trimming')
```

## Data and Model Configurations 
**Data**  
**File name:  ** `r params$file`  
**Data Type:  **  `r params$data`  
**Year range:  ** `r yrange`    

**Data Modification**  
**Trimmed Year range: **`r rbyr`  

```{r,echo = FALSE, fig.cap = paste0("Figure 2. Percentile Analyses")}

```


```{r,echo = FALSE, fig.cap = paste0("Figure 3.  Risk Analyses")}

```

```{r}
kable(,caption = "Table 1.  Annual Escapement",format="pandoc" ) 
```
